titleStmt.title: SII 11.21: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 21. (B.K. No. 20 of 1926-27). BEṬIGĒRI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON ONE OF THE HERO-STONES IN AN ENCLOSURE KNOWN AS MALLAYYANA-KAṬṬE.

summary.p: The record refers itself to the reign of Akāḷavarsha (i.e., Kṛishṇa II) and is dated in Śaka 814, Pramādi, Āshāḍha, śu. 7, Sunday (= A.D. 893, June 24, Sunday). It states that a hero named Kaligaḷḷa died in a battle when Maṅgatōraṇa was governing Beḷvola-nāḍu and a lady, probably his wife, set up the monument. The attack of Baṭṭakeṟe (i.e., modern Beṭigēri) by a certain Nāgadhōra seems to have been the cause of the fight.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svastyakāḷavarṣa śrīṣ®thvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśva
raṁ paramabhaṭṭarakaruttarōttarābhivṛddhipravadramāna vijayakalyāṇarājyābhyudayajābhyudaya
māge sale śakanṛpakāḷātīta saṁvatsarasataṅga ḷeṇṭunūṟapadinālkaneya prabhavādipa
rāvarttanasaṁvarttita ghaṭanaghaṭīyaṁtraṁ śrīmaṅgatōraṇan pramādiyembasaṁvatsaradāṣāḍha
suddha saptami Ādityavāradandu beḷvolanāḍa nāḷdirke nāgadhōranaṁbō baṭṭekeṟeya
dhāṟige muṟiyavaḍada polana koḷvenandu bandoḍḍi nindāneṁba mātaṁ kēḷdu koḻtūba
na pola mana kāduvemendu paricchēdisi naḍavāgaḷde baṭṭage ṟeneṟemme kaligaḷḷaneṁbō
ṟiya bāḻenendu paricchēdisi peṇḍiranuḻidoḍevuṭṭido rade dēgulakevandu dēvargge
rudrākṣamaṁ baḷikoṇṭu kaṭṭi triśūla maniṭṭu koḻtūbana nediṟci
ḍivāki kādi sattōṁ © polana koḷvemendu ndu bēḻda dhōraṁ
[®tige] kāla
yabbe māḍisidōḷ © kāśyapagōtra
Digital edition of SII 11.21 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
